title: Glitched Out
description: A resourcepack that makes all textures look glitched out by  moving parts inside the texture
body: This resource pack makes all Minecraft textures look glitched or broken by shifting parts of the images around. Blocks and items look scrambled or out of place, like a visual glitch. This is done by splitting the texture into many parts of different sizes and shuffling some of them together to change how the texture looks
